jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
